SEARCH
Package eu.algites.lib.common.interval

Class AIcInterval<T extends Comparable>

java.lang.Object
eu.algites.lib.common.interval.AIcInterval<T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
AIiInterval<T>, Serializable
public class AIcInterval<T extends Comparable> extends Object implements AIiInterval<T>, Serializable

Title: AIcInterval

Description: Default immutable implementation of AIiInterval.

Notes:

  • The boundary value may be null if AInIntervalBoundary.isBoundaryValueIgnored() returns true.
  • This class does not attempt to reinterpret boundary semantics; it follows the contract of AIiInterval.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form
Date:
26.01.26

  • Constructor Details

    • AIcInterval

      public AIcInterval(@Nonnull AInIntervalBoundary aLeftBoundary, @Nullable T aLeftValue, @Nonnull AInIntervalBoundary aRightBoundary, @Nullable T aRightValue)
      Creates a new interval.
      Parameters:
      aLeftBoundary - left boundary
      aLeftValue - left value (may be null if the boundary ignores its value)
      aRightBoundary - right boundary
      aRightValue - right value (may be null if the boundary ignores its value)

    • AIcInterval

      protected AIcInterval(@Nonnull AInIntervalBoundary aLeftBoundary, @Nullable T aLeftValue, @Nonnull AInIntervalBoundary aRightBoundary, @Nullable T aRightValue, boolean aSkipValidation)
      Creates a new interval.

      This constructor exists primarily for subclasses that need to defer validation (e.g., when ordering must be evaluated using a custom comparator).

      Parameters:
      aLeftBoundary - left boundary
      aLeftValue - left value (may be null if the boundary ignores its value)
      aRightBoundary - right boundary
      aRightValue - right value (may be null if the boundary ignores its value)
      aSkipValidation - when true, the constructor does not validate the interval

    • getLeftBoundary

      @Nonnull public AInIntervalBoundary getLeftBoundary()
      Description copied from interface: AIiInterval
      Left boundary of the interval

    • getLeftValue

      public T getLeftValue()
      Description copied from interface: AIiInterval
      Left value of the interval
      Specified by:
      getLeftValue in interface AIiInterval<T extends Comparable>
      Returns:
      left value. The left value may be unspecified in the case AIiInterval.getLeftBoundary() returns true for AInIntervalBoundary.isBoundaryValueIgnored()

      Description copied from interface: AIiInterval
      Right value of the interval
      Specified by:
      getRightValue in interface AIiInterval<T extends Comparable>
      Returns:
      right value. The right value may be unspecified in the case AIiInterval.getRightBoundary() returns true for AInIntervalBoundary.isBoundaryValueIgnored()
